name: skill-classifier
description: WIP: two LLM-backed hooks (Ollama by default, Gemini CLI fallback) — a UserPromptSubmit classifier that suggests relevant skills, and a PreToolUse subagent-prompt quality gate that injects advisory feedback before agent dispatch. Two-layer architecture: local LLM for classification, skills for detailed guidance.

skills.name: skill-classifier
skills.description: LLM-powered skill discovery hook that suggests relevant skills.

scripts.name: skill_classifier
scripts.description: Skill classifier hook (Ollama default, Gemini CLI fallback)

scripts.name: llm_backend
scripts.description: Swappable LLM backend shared by classifier hooks

scripts.name: prompt_quality_gate
scripts.description: PreToolUse hook: advisory quality review of subagent prompts

backends.ollama: Default. Local Ollama server (https://ollama.com); pull a small model and set SKILL_CLASSIFIER_MODEL. No Python packages required (stdlib urllib).
backends.gemini: Fallback. Requires the `gemini` CLI on PATH and GEMINI_API_KEY.
